summary: Smoke test for Guardian Juri MVP. Backend auth + core list endpoints working. Frontend end-to-end: login (valid+invalid), dashboard KPIs, sidebar, cliente create, processo create, agenda/financeiro/usuarios pages load, logout — all passed. Deep flows (PDF upload/view, toggle status, role restriction for estagiario, edit/delete) not exercised in this first-finish pass.
passed: Login UI: wrong password shows login-error-message
Login UI: valid credentials redirect to /dashboard
Clientes: create client via modal persists and appears in list
Processos: create processo linked to client, row rendered with processo-row-{id}
Agenda, Financeiro, Usuarios pages load with their primary add buttons
action_items: Optional: recharts ResponsiveContainer warns 'width(-1) height(-1)' on dashboard-chart — cosmetic; consider setting minHeight on container.
Deferred to full testing: PDF upload/visualizar/delete flow, toggle-prazo/toggle-status, edit/delete cliente, estagiario role restriction on /usuarios, user create+delete.
